$description: bounded.tools content tokens — EXTENDS the canonical Bounded Systems core (brand submodule, brand/content/strings.json). The content tool merges core + this file. Restates the schema-required core tokens (name/tagline/description) verbatim — the schema + brand-voice scenarios enforce they stay identical to core — then adds the surface-specific copy for https://bounded.tools.

name.$description: Org name — exact casing. Mirrors core (must match).

description.$value: Capability security for AI agents — authority drawn at the door, not the process or container. Every claim graded against the running code.
description.$description: One-line / meta description. Mirrors core (must match).

hero-pitch.$value: Your coding agent wanders. Keep it inside the job you gave it.
hero-pitch.$description: Hero sub-headline — the problem in one line (surface-specific).

section-proof.$description: Section heading — claims graded against running code.

byline.$value: Built by Robert DeLanghe — in public, against running code.
